title: An Account of the Messenger of God's Slave Concubines
description: Slave Concubines They were Mariyah bt. Sham'un, the Copt, and Rayhanah bt. Zayd a1-Quraziyyah, who, it is said, was of the Bann al-Na4ir. An account of them has been given above. 935• Ibn Sa'd, Tabagat, VIII, 106-7, 113-14, mentions Mulaykah bt. Ka'b alLaythi, Bint Jundub, and Sabi bt. al-$alt among the women whom the Prophet married but did not consummate the marriage and then divorced them. Khawlah bt. Hakim and Amimah bt.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 09
